productName: Ooowee - Live Resin - B - 1G Disposable - Truffle Oreos - 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Truffle Oreos oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Grab-and-go convenience, a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
